scenes.text:
Being broke is a situation. Being
poor is a state of mind.

There is a massive difference between broke and poor. Broke means your bank account is empty right now. Poor means your mind is empty of
ideas. Broke people know they are passing through. Poor people believe they are stuck forever. One is a circumstance. The other is a belief system.

If you are broke right now, good. Use that hunger. Let that empty bank account fuel your fire. Some of the
wealthiest people in the world started with nothing. Not because they had advantages, but because they had the right mindset.

Your bank account does not
define you. Your mindset does.

If you turned broke into motivation, share
your story. Follow for wealth mindset.
